title: Resolution Requesting to the Local Chief Executive to Post Online and to Three (3) Conspicuous Public Places in the Municipality the Official List of Those Who Benefited From the Emergency Subsidy From the National Government Amounting to Php 97,105,000.00, in Accordance with the Data Privacy Act Law. (AUTHOR(S): Hon. Miko C. Pelegrina, Hon. Janos S. Lapiz, Hon. Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Hon. Mike Dexter A. Concio, Hon. Mark Lester B. Dizon, Hon. Rodora P. Loares, Hon. Jozylyn N. Manansala, 06/07/202
